title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, right zoom in
scenario: Tapping the right circle button on the two-earbuds screen causes the view to zoom in and display new text
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. On the Device Settings screen, locate the two-earbuds view (second screen).
5. Tap the right circle button on the two-earbuds screen.
expected: The view should zoom in and display new text related to the right earbud.
